title: ARTFLY Glow in The Dark Paint Set of 12 Bright Colors 30ml/1oz, Acrylic Glow Paint Perfect for Art Painting, DIY Projects, Halloween and Christmas Decorations, Rich Pigments
features: GLOW IN THE DARK: ARTFLY glow in the dark paint has rich pigments to ensure that each color will glow for hours after absorbing light under light sources. It is recommended to be used with black light or LED light for better effect.
HIGH QUALITY GLOW PAINTS: This acrylic paint set has high-quality pigments, great light fastness, and gloss finish, can glow brilliantly and vividly in the dark.

MULTI-USAGE: ARTFLY glow paints can use on most painting surfaces including Canvas, Paper, Wood, Leather, Model, and Crafts. This glow in the dark acrylic paint is perfect for Halloween and Christmas costumes parties decorations, and DIY projects.

THE BRST GIFT: The glow acrylic paint set is a wonderful gift to Halloween, birthday, Christmas, and even holiday craft supplies! It's perfect for artists, art hobbyists, and students, will inspire their creativity.
SATISFACTION SERVICE: No need to worry about toxicity with our paints. They are safe, non-toxic, conforms to safety certificates: U.S. ASTM D-4236 & EU EN71.
